name: Stuffed Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Depending on the size of the squash, allow 1/2 per person.
2. Parboil the whole squash in salted water until tender.
3. Remove from the water and slice lengthwise to halve the squash.
4. Scoop out the center of the squash into a bowl.
5. Add an equal amount of finely diced yellow cheese, a little cream or milk, salt, and pepper, then return the filling to the squash shell.
6. Top with fine bread crumbs and dot with butter.
7. Bake until the cheese is melted.
